title: selaginella jacquemontii
intro: Selaginella jacquemontii, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella jacquemontii include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve immune function, and protect against various diseases. Selaginella jacquemontii can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
